steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
$$2x^2-23xy+45y^2+16xy-40y^2$$
The $xy$ terms combine to $-7xy$, and the $y^2$ terms combine to $5y^2$. So the equivalent expression is $$2x^2-7xy+5y^2.$$

steps.title: State the equivalent expression
steps.content: The simplified expression is $2x^2-7xy+5y^2$, which is choice B and the correct equivalent form. This final expression keeps the $x^2$ term from the first product and combines the two $xy$ contributions into $-7xy$.
